uplink.description: Port 1 format 0x14: battery, boot, temp/pressure/RH, lux (TTN catalog example input)

uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected.data authored from running reference/upstream-codec.js (codec-catena-generic.js) then normalizing per the mapping notes. Raw: vBat 16794/4096, boot 7, tempC 5760/256, pRaw 25331 (1013.24 hPa, atmospheric), rh8 141/256*100, lux 305.

uplink.description: Port 1 format 0x17 (AQI): adds air-quality index mapped to air.co2
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected.data authored from running reference/upstream-codec.js then normalizing. Format 0x17 flag 0x20 carries a UFLT16 air-quality index; raw 0xFC80 scales to 400 ppm-equivalent -> air.co2.

Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected.data authored from running reference/upstream-codec.js then normalizing. Port 3 has no discriminator and uses a 16-bit humidity field: rhRaw 39321/65535*100 = 60%.

uplink.description: Port 2 (discriminator-less): battery + temp/pressure/RH + secondary rail (vBus extra)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected.data authored from running reference/upstream-codec.js then normalizing. Port 2 carries pressure (atmospheric) and an 8-bit RH; flag 0x20 is the secondary supply rail -> vBus extra (vRaw 8000/4096).

uplink.description: Unsupported fPort 4 (the 4802's legacy Modbus port is not handled by the generic-codec mapping)
uplink._note: Error vector. The TTN catalog maps current-firmware 4802 uplinks to codec-catena-generic on ports 1/2/3; the legacy codec-catena4802.js used fPort 4 (flag bitmap + trailing Modbus registers), which this normalized codec does not decode.
